title: Operational Provenance Record
description: Lineage metadata linking generated artifacts to sources and governing contracts.

run_id.description: Identifier of the run that produced this provenance record.

generated_by_engine.description: Engine responsible for generating the artifact.

source_artifacts.description: Identifiers or paths to source artifacts used during generation.

repo.description: Repository URL or slug containing the generating engine.

commit_sha.description: Commit SHA that generated the artifact.

contract_version.description: Version of the contract governing the artifact.
